heading: Sample Data
body:
This quick start uses the `sample_mflix` database, which contains collections
with movie details.

The `fullplot` field in the `movies` collection contains text that
describes the plot of the movie.

By configuring MongoDB Vector Search to automatically generate embeddings for text data in
your collection, such as the `fullplot` field in the `movies` collection,
you can use MongoDB Vector Search to also generate embeddings for natural language
queries against the `fullplot` field. MongoDB Vector Search can use the Voyage AI API (Application Programming Interface)
keys to generate embeddings from available Voyage AI embedding models.
